'''âsh-r-f''' ('''kasharaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vague|vague]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-r-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vague|vague]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-r-f
|-
! Lemma
| kasharaf
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisharaf|thisharaf]] || [[word:jisharaf|jisharaf]] || [[word:shisharaf|shisharaf]] || [[word:kisharaf|kisharaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusharaf|thuthusharaf]] || [[word:jujusharaf|jujusharaf]] || [[word:shushusharaf|shushusharaf]] || [[word:kukusharaf|kukusharaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusharaf|thusharaf]] || [[word:jusharaf|jusharaf]] || [[word:shusharaf|shusharaf]] || [[word:kusharaf|kusharaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusharaf|thusharaf]] || [[word:jusharaf|jusharaf]] || [[word:shusharaf|shusharaf]] || [[word:kusharaf|kusharaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesharaf|thesharaf]] || [[word:jesharaf|jesharaf]] || [[word:shesharaf|shesharaf]] || [[word:kesharaf|kesharaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosharaf|thothosharaf]] || [[word:jojosharaf|jojosharaf]] || [[word:shoshosharaf|shoshosharaf]] || [[word:kokosharaf|kokosharaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosharaf|thosharaf]] || [[word:josharaf|josharaf]] || [[word:shosharaf|shosharaf]] || [[word:kosharaf|kosharaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosharaf|thosharaf]] || [[word:josharaf|josharaf]] || [[word:shosharaf|shosharaf]] || [[word:kosharaf|kosharaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsharaf|thĂŠsharaf]] || [[word:jĂŠsharaf|jĂŠsharaf]] || [[word:shĂŠsharaf|shĂŠsharaf]] || [[word:kĂŠsharaf|kĂŠsharaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasharaf|thathasharaf]] || [[word:jajasharaf|jajasharaf]] || [[word:shashasharaf|shashasharaf]] || [[word:kakasharaf|kakasharaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasharaf|thasharaf]] || [[word:jasharaf|jasharaf]] || [[word:shasharaf|shasharaf]] || [[word:kasharaf|kasharaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasharaf|thasharaf]] || [[word:jasharaf|jasharaf]] || [[word:shasharaf|shasharaf]] || [[word:kasharaf|kasharaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasharaf|shasharaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasharaf|goshasharaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasharaf|gokishasharaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasharafnĂŒ|shasharafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasharafnknĂŒ|goshasharafnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasharafnĂŒ|gokishasharafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasharafshĂ«|shasharafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasharafnkshĂ«|goshasharafnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasharafshĂ«|gokishasharafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasharafro|shasharafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasharafnkro|goshasharafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasharafro|gokishasharafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasharafmu|shasharafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasharafnkmu|goshasharafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasharafmu|gokishasharafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasharafsher|shasharafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasharafnksher|goshasharafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasharafsher|gokishasharafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasharafng|shasharafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasharafnkng|goshasharafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasharafng|gokishasharafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasharafya|shasharafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasharafnkya|goshasharafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasharafya|gokishasharafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasharafyam|shasharafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasharafnkyam|goshasharafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasharafyam|gokishasharafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasharafnĂŒshĂ«|shasharafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasharafnknĂŒshĂ«|goshasharafnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasharafnĂŒshĂ«|gokishasharafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasharafnĂŒro|shasharafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasharafnknĂŒro|goshasharafnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasharafnĂŒro|gokishasharafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasharafnĂŒmu|shasharafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasharafnknĂŒmu|goshasharafnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasharafnĂŒmu|gokishasharafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasharafshĂ«nĂŒ|shasharafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasharafnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshasharafnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasharafshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishasharafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasharafshĂ«ro|shasharafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasharafnkshĂ«ro|goshasharafnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasharafshĂ«ro|gokishasharafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasharafshĂ«mu|shasharafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasharafnkshĂ«mu|goshasharafnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasharafshĂ«mu|gokishasharafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasharafronĂŒ|shasharafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasharafnkronĂŒ|goshasharafnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasharafronĂŒ|gokishasharafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasharafroshĂ«|shasharafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasharafnkroshĂ«|goshasharafnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasharafroshĂ«|gokishasharafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasharafromu|shasharafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasharafnkromu|goshasharafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasharafromu|gokishasharafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasharafmunĂŒ|shasharafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasharafnkmunĂŒ|goshasharafnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasharafmunĂŒ|gokishasharafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasharafmushĂ«|shasharafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasharafnkmushĂ«|goshasharafnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasharafmushĂ«|gokishasharafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasharafmuro|shasharafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasharafnkmuro|goshasharafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasharafmuro|gokishasharafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|27df60f}}
